n: Vale of Sorcery: The Trial of Sorrow

steps.t: Thargaun must be somewhere in Minas Morgul. You should seek out Thargaun to learn more about the second artifact.
Thargaun is in Minas Morgul. You should talk to Thargaun.
The artifact you seek is somewhere in Cirith Ungol. You should search some locations where the artifact might be.
The artifact you seek is somewhere in Cirith Ungol. You should search one more location where the artifact might be.
The strange pile of dust can be found in Cirith Ungol. You should examine the pile of dust.
The scratch marks lead into Torech Ungol. You should follow the scratch marks.
The artifact you seek can be found in Torech Ungol. You should find the artifact.
The Orb of Sorrow can be found in Torech Ungol. You should destroy the Orb of Sorrow.
The Orb of Sorrow can be found in Torech Ungol. Try to resist the visions of sorrow.
The Orb of Sorrow can be found in Torech Ungol. Try to resist the visions of sorrow.
The Orb of Sorrow can be found in Torech Ungol. Try to resist the visions of sorrow.
Thurindol can be found at Echad Uial. You should talk to Thurindol.
